Play, Imagine &
Discover with Pippino

Welcome to a world where curiosity leads every adventure.

Pippino is a little explorer who loves discovering new places, asking questions and turning everyday moments into exciting journeys. Through books, stories, creative activities and playful products, Pippino helps children learn, imagine and grow while having fun.

Whether your child loves coloring, solving challenges, learning about the world or creating their own stories, there is always a new adventure waiting.

EXPLORE THE WORLD OF PIPPINO

A World Built for Curious Minds

At Pippino Kids, we believe children learn best when they are playing, exploring and creating.

🎨

Creativity and self-expression

🌍

Curiosity about the world

💡

Problem-solving and imagination

💖

Family connection and shared experiences

🛋️

Meaningful screen-free moments

Meet Pippino

Pippino is a small green adventurer with a big imagination.

Part dinosaur, part crocodile and part mysterious little bean sprout, Pippino is always ready to explore new places, learn new things and make new friends.

Through his adventures, children are encouraged to embrace curiosity, creativity and confidence.

Explore the Collection

Discover coloring books, activity books, educational adventures, illustrated apparel and special gifts designed to bring the Pippino universe into everyday life.

Coloring Books
Activity Books
Educational Adventures
Apparel
Gifts

Join the Pippino Club

Become part of a growing community of curious families.

Receive exclusive activities, printable resources, creative challenges, early access to new releases and special surprises throughout the year.

Premium members may also enjoy personalized birthday gifts designed especially for each child's age and interests.

LEARN MORE

Created by Victoria YTC

Pippino Kids was created by Victoria YTC, a character designer, illustrator and multimedia creator passionate about building meaningful experiences for children and families.

Her work combines storytelling, design, education and imagination to create worlds where children can play, learn and dream.

Every Adventure Begins with Curiosity

Come explore, create and discover with Pippino.

START THE ADVENTURE
